value:
Subject: Application for AI/ML Engineer Position – Ayush Shakya

Dear Hiring Team,

I am excited to submit my application for the AI/ML Engineer position at your esteemed organization in Hyderabad. With a strong foundation in computer science from GLA University and hands-on experience in software development, problem-solving, and technical research, I am eager to contribute to your innovative projects involving AI and machine learning.

Throughout my academic journey, I have actively participated in competitions and presentations, earning recognition such as first and second runner-up awards at IBM events. These experiences have honed my skills in developing solutions, collaborating effectively within teams, and communicating complex ideas clearly. I am particularly enthusiastic about applying my knowledge to develop AI applications utilizing cloud services, deep learning, neural networks, and GenAI models, aligning well with the requirements of this role.

I am confident that my technical skills, combined with my passion for AI/ML, make me a strong candidate to support your team’s objectives. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how I can contribute to your projects and help drive innovation.

Thank you for considering my application. I am available at your convenience for an interview.

Warm regards,  
Ayush Shakya  
[Your Contact Information]  
[LinkedIn Profile or Portfolio, if applicable]
